channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Mattress in walkway between 41 and 43 Elstree gardens, 30th April
item.description:
Mattress dumped

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elstree Gardens, Lessness Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: All traffic lights are out, 30th April
item.description:
Lights on the a12 near whalebone north are not working
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Whalebone Lane North, Marks Gate, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light continuously on, 30th April
item.description:
The street light on the corner of Cyrena Road and Silvester Road is currently permanently on, even during the day.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Silvester Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffic cones being used to claim public spaces, 30th April
item.description:
Multiple parking spots (at least 3) are regularly being obstructed with traffic cones in order to reserve the spaces.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): May's Hill Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish on street, 30th April
item.description:
Rubbish on street after bin collection

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Culford Mews, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter and bags, 30th April
item.description:
Bags and litter

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sharratt Street, Bermondsey, Greater London

item.title: Cars parked illegally, 30th April
item.description:
Cars parked dangerously on double yellow lines as well as parked without cpz permit entire wells way triangle Dowlas rainbow Coleman road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rainbow Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Corrugated Iron slabs & large wooden cable reel dumped on path!, 30th April
item.description:
The weekly fly tipping crime has occurred again in Charlton Park Lane. Sheets of corrugated iron and a large wooden cable reel have been dumped on the path of Charlton Park Lane. This is a hazard to the pedestrians and unsightly too. Steps need to be taken to prevent this from repeatedly occurring on this pathway.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Park Lane, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Et64 ebt, 30th April
item.description:
Black Ford with flat tyre has been parked in same location and unmoved for several months now.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Margaret Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Van has been abandoned, 30th April
item.description:
This van has been parked in the same place outside No 8 White Oak Gardens for over 2 months,haven’t seen anybody return to it or move it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elder Close, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gas canisters collected from ocal grass land and bushes, 30th April
item.description:
The Hollies is having alot of issues with people throwing away gas canisters in bushes and in the grassland. We have collected them and we do not know where or how to dispose of them The gas cannisters are by the entrance door of the hollies countryside club 34 acacia way sidcup Da15 8WW

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 34, Acacia Way, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fallen branches on grass verge, 30th April
item.description:
Fallen branches ,fell during high winds 29th April. Grass verge by 200 watling Street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Martens Avenue, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hotel rubbish collection, 30th April
item.description:
This vehicle has had its engine running for the past 30 mins,

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lane to Patterson Park, 30th April
item.description:
Bags of hedge cuttings dumped,could they be removed please? Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lynton Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tipping, 30th April
item.description:
Fly-tipping wood and plastic on corner of Brandram and Glenton Rod partially blocking pavement, Has been here 3 days.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Glenton Road, Blackheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping in car park Barrowfield Close N9, 30th April
item.description:
Flytipping has been added to the flytip that is still there and reported on 1st March 2026 council vans keep driving pass everyday and ignoring it now more has been added i also have cctv of the recent flytip that happened yesterday morning 18 April 2026.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): St Malo Avenue, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree branches blocking sensors for traffic lights., 30th April
item.description:
Tree branches blocking sensors for traffic lights.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): North End Road, Golders Green, Greater London

item.title: Car stuck in tress, 30th April
item.description:
Car stuck in trees
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drainage metal cover moving not fixed properly, 30th April
item.description:
Drainage metal cover not fixed properly all time making making when any cars cross the road am living on next door I can't sleep because of making noise all the time as its busy road and 2nd line is bus lane please try to fix it..2 months ago now
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sylvester Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on dental practice shutters, 30th April
item.description:
Graffiti on dental practice shutters. bermondsey dental studio 188 jamaica road se16 4rt. job was recently posted and has now been closed. job has not been carried out. graffitti still present and needs cleaning
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Jamaica Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
